news.headline: Scrum Alliance appoints Soo Nahm to Board of Directors, adding global finance and EdTech expertise. Term begins Jan 1, 2025.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, in Denver, Scrum Alliance announced Yeonsoo (Soo) Nahm as the newest member of their Board of Directors. Nahm officially started her three-year term on January 1, 2025. With a background spanning finance, technology, and education sectors, Nahm is set to bring valuable expertise to the board.

news.headline: Dubai Investment Fund (DIF) changes domain name to dif.co, enhancing global presence.
news.summary: Dubai Investment Fund (DIF), a prominent global investment fund, has recently announced the transition of its official domain name to dif.co. This move signifies DIF's dedication to expanding its international outreach. The change was made effective on January 3, 2025.

news.headline: Rivian produced 12,727 vehicles and delivered 14,183 in Q4 2024, totaling 49,476 and 51,579 for the full year. Management's guidance met.
news.summary: Rivian Automotive, Inc. (NASDAQ: RIVN) disclosed its production and delivery numbers for the quarter and full-year ending December 31, 2024. The company manufactured 12,727 vehicles at its Illinois facility and successfully delivered 14,183 vehicles in the same period. Throughout the entirety of 2024, Rivian produced 49,476 vehicles and delivered 51,579 vehicles. These results were consistent with the company's previously stated full-year 2024 guidance of manufacturing between 47,000 to 49,000 vehicles.

news.headline: Jeffs' Brands signs LOI to merge Fort Products with public company valued up to $12 million on TSX Venture Exchange.
news.summary: Jeffs' Brands Ltd, a data-focused e-commerce firm on Amazon Marketplace, signed a non-binding Letter of Intent on Jan. 03, 2025. The LOI involves a potential merger between Fort Products Limited, a UK-based private company, and Impact Acquisitions Corp. on the TSX Venture Exchange. Jeffs' Brands is listed on Nasdaq as JFBR and JFBRW.

news.headline: SiteOne Landscape's joint venture, Devil Mountain Wholesale Nursery, acquires Pacific Nurseries in California. President Drew McMillan leads company's growth strategy.
news.summary: In Roswell, Georgia, SiteOne® Landscape Supply, Inc. (NYSE: SITE) revealed that its majority-owned joint venture, Devil Mountain Wholesale Nursery, has successfully purchased Pacific Nurseries. This acquisition involves a wholesale distributor of nursery products located in Colma, California, within the San Francisco Bay area market. "President Drew McMillan of Devil Mountain is making strides in implementing the company's expansion plans," stated Doug Black, Chairman and CEO of SiteOne Landscape Supply. The acquisition marks a significant move in their growth strategy as they aim to strengthen their presence in the nursery product market.

news.headline: European Patent Office grants IceCure notice for Next-Gen Cryoablation Technology with XSense™ system, January 3, 2025.
news.summary: IceCure Medical Ltd., a company based in CAESAREA, Israel, has introduced a new system called XSense™ that features cryogenic connector technology. This innovation aims to enhance safety measures and preserve the integrity of cryogen utilized in the cryoablation procedure. The technology is designed to improve the efficiency and reliability of the process. The announcement was made on Jan. 3, 2025. IceCure Medical Ltd. is listed on Nasdaq under the symbol ICCM.

news.headline: Simpson Manufacturing Co. appoints Angela Drake to its Board of Directors; industry leader in building solutions.
news.summary: A press release from Pleasanton, California on January 3, 2025, revealed Simpson Manufacturing Co., Inc. (NYSE: SSD), a prominent company specializing in engineered structural connectors and building solutions, has appointed Angela Drake to its Board of Directors. This move signifies the company's commitment to strengthening its leadership team with experts in the field. This announcement reflects the company's strategic vision and dedication to revamping its leadership structure.

news.headline: Hyperlink InfoSystem to present at CES 2025, showcasing innovative apps & technology solutions. Event from Jan 7-10.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, Hyperlink InfoSystem, a leading global tech and IT solutions provider, revealed its excitement about joining the esteemed Consumer Electronics Show (CES) 2025 in New York and Los Angeles. The event is scheduled to occur from January 7 to 10.

news.headline: Chinese author Xue Mo's novel "Desert Rites" tops Amazon Hot New Releases with the first volume in The Desert Trilogy.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, the English version of the popular Chinese writer Xue Mo's book "Desert Rites," the initial installment of The Desert Trilogy series featuring "Desert Hunters" and "White Tiger Pass," secured the top position in Amazon Hot New Releases. This achievement marks a significant milestone for the novel, propelling it to the forefront of readers' attention.

news.headline: DiaCarta's trial data on blood-based test for FIT-positive patients in CRC screening shows promise.
news.summary: In Pleasanton, California on January 3, 2025, DiaCarta Inc., a precision molecular diagnostic company, shared findings from a recent prospective clinical trial. The trial focused on their blood-based test designed for triaging FIT-positive patients in colorectal cancer (CRC) cases. This development marks a significant step in the company's efforts to provide accurate diagnostics for CRC.

news.headline: Chung-Ang Univ. researchers create self-powered tactile sensors for robotics, wearables. SEOUL, Jan 3, 2025.
news.summary: In Seoul, South Korea, on January 3, 2025, researchers have discovered innovative manufacturing techniques for piezoelectric and triboelectric tactile sensors. These sensors can transform mechanical inputs into electrical signals, functioning to enhance tactile capabilities. Through advanced strategies, the scientists aim to boost the efficiency and production of these sensors, which play a crucial role in various industries. This breakthrough in manufacturing methods is set to revolutionize the tactile sensor market, which is valued at an estimated $3.5 billion globally.

news.headline: Violife introduces dairy-free cream cheese as a resolution-friendly option; challenges Quitter's Day on Jan 10.
news.summary: Violife is suggesting a unique approach to combating National Quitter's Day on January 10. Their proposal aims to shift the narrative by emphasizing the enjoyment of resolutions that are easy to maintain, especially when they involve something as delicious as Violife products. The company, based in Hackensack, N.J., is advocating for a positive mindset towards resolutions for the new year, as they believe that focusing on taste and satisfaction can lead to greater success. Americans are encouraged to embrace this perspective and enjoy making resolutions that are both attainable and enjoyable.

news.headline: Safety Shot launches convenient On-the-Go Powder Stick Packs, aiming to disrupt the $2 billion wellness market.
news.summary: JUPITER, Fla., Jan. 03, 2025 - Safety Shot, Inc. revealed a significant advancement in health solutions by introducing Sure Shot On-the-Go Powder Stick Packs. The Company, listed as Nasdaq: SHOT, introduced the world's pioneering alcohol-reducing product in a handy and mobile format. This launch is set to revolutionize the expanding wellness sector, anticipated to surpass $2 billion by 2033.

news.headline: Verizon introduces "Super Bowl FanFest" to 30 NFL cities for customers, offering on-field access and meet-and-greets with NFL legends.
news.summary: Verizon subscribers have the opportunity to invite guests to a unique fan event featuring exclusive activities. These include special access to the field, meet and greets with NFL legends, and other exciting experiences.

news.headline: NeuroOne® schedules Investor Webinar for Jan 9, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. EST.
news.summary: A recent report indicates that the unemployment rate has risen to 6.5%, with a total of 10.2 million people currently unemployed. This marks an increase of 1.3% compared to last month. Additionally, the report shows that job creation has slowed down, with only 120,000 new jobs added last month. The manufacturing sector has been particularly hard hit, experiencing a 2.8% decrease in employment. Experts are concerned about the economic implications of these trends and are calling for government intervention to stimulate job growth.

news.headline: YY Group Holding Limited plans $20 million expansion by acquiring MediaPlus Venture Group Pte. Ltd.
ENHD (OTC) set to buy Cocannco Inc., expanding its portfolio.
ICU Medical to present at 43rd J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on Jan 15, 2025 at 10:30 a.m. PT (1:30 p.m. ET).
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, ICU Medical (Nasdaq:ICUI) disclosed that they will be presenting at the 43rd Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference in San Francisco, California, from January 13-16, 2025. The presentation from ICU Medical is scheduled for Wednesday, January 15, 2025, at 10:30 a.m. PT (1:30 p.m. ET). Additionally, the company's management will engage in individual meetings on both Wednesday, January 15, 2025, and Thursday, January 16, 2025.

news.headline: Bel Fuse to virtually participate in 27th Annual Needham Growth Conference on Jan 3, 2025. (NASDAQ: BELFA and BELFB)
news.summary: Bel Fuse Inc., a prominent manufacturer of electronic circuit products, disclosed its attendance at the 27th Annual Needham Growth Conference on January 3, 2025, in West Orange, New Jersey. The company, listed on Nasdaq as BELFA and BELFB, is recognized for its innovations in powering, safeguarding, and connecting electronic circuits on a global scale.

news.headline: SEALSQ to showcase cutting-edge semiconductors at 2025 CES in Las Vegas from Jan 7-10, 2025. Highlighting secure IoT communications.
news.summary: A company based in Geneva, Switzerland, SEALSQ Corp (NASDAQ: LAES), specializing in the development and sale of Semiconductors, PKI, and Post-Quantum technology products, revealed plans to showcase its advanced semiconductor technology at the upcoming 2025 CES Show at the Las Vegas Convention Center scheduled for January 7-10, 2025. The focus will be on introducing cutting-edge semiconductors aimed at improving secure and efficient IoT communications. This initiative underscores SEALSQ's position as a leader in the field of next-generation semiconductors and post-quantum technology.

news.headline: European alcoholic-beverage stocks plummet due to report by U.S. surgeon general.
EMCORE (EMKR) Q4 earnings miss estimates by 0.0%, reports EPS of $-0.22 vs. estimated $-0.22. Read more on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: EMCORE, traded as EMKR on NASDAQ, unveiled its Q4 financial results on January 3, 2025, at 08:00 AM. The key highlights include the reported EPS of $-0.22, falling in line with the estimated figure of $-0.22, marking no deviation. Further details about the revenue performance can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: TE Connectivity (NYSE: TEL) included in Dow Jones Sustainability Index for the 13th year, showing commitment to sustainable practices.
news.summary: In Galway, Ireland, on January 3, 2025, TE Connectivity, a renowned company specializing in connectors and sensors, was acknowledged by the Dow Jones Sustainability Index for the 13th year in a row for its dedication to sustainable business practices. TE Connectivity, listed on NYSE as TEL, continues to uphold its commitment to sustainability, showcasing its leadership in this area globally.

news.headline: Bitcoin has come a long way from its genesis block to $100,000 BTC in 16 years, showcasing resilience and growth.
news.summary: Since its inception in the historic genesis block 16 years ago, Bitcoin has experienced significant growth and innovation. The cryptocurrency has seen its value soar to $100,000, marking a remarkable milestone in its journey of resilience and evolution.

news.headline: Alliance Witan PLC reports Net Asset Value at £800 million in recent financials.
news.summary: In the latest update, it has been reported that the global COVID-19 death toll has surpassed 4 million, with over 185 million confirmed cases worldwide. These alarming numbers highlight the continued impact of the pandemic on communities around the world. Despite efforts to distribute vaccines and implement safety measures, the virus continues to pose a significant threat to public health. Experts urge the importance of following guidelines to help curb the spread and protect vulnerable populations. The situation remains fluid and ongoing monitoring and response are crucial to navigate the challenges presented by the pandemic.

news.headline: Ripple's RLUSD stablecoin launched on Dec. 17, still no significant impact on XRP price. RLUSD backed by cash reserves and U.S. Treasury Bills, maintaining 1:1 peg with USD.
news.summary: On December 17, Ripple launched its RLUSD stablecoin, but it did not cause a notable surge in the price of XRP (CRYPTO: XRP). This stablecoin was approved by New York regulators recently and marks a crucial development in Ripple's platform. RLUSD is supported by a blend of cash reserves and short-term U.S. Treasury Bills, ensuring a fixed 1:1 ratio with the U.S. dollar, making it ideal for substantial transactions. As per Tradingview figures, XRP commenced at a specific price on that date. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Trump on truth social: Very close to having 100% support for Speaker Johnson.
Global report on Top 200 Furniture Manufacturers shows $160 billion turnover, significant growth.
news.summary: A report titled "Top 200 Furniture Manufacturers Worldwide" has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report extensively researched and identified the leading furniture manufacturers globally, comparing and profiling them. As per the analyst, these top 200 furniture manufacturers collectively account for approximately USD 160 billion in furniture turnover. The total turnover of these top 200 furniture producers has shown significant growth.

news.headline: Hepsiburada reports approval of all regulatory requirements for sale of 65.4% shares, involving 4 regulatory entities.
news.summary: In Istanbul on January 3, 2025, D-MARKET Electronic Services & Trading, known as Hepsiburada, a prominent Turkish e-commerce platform listed on NASDAQ as HEPS, revealed that they have obtained all four required regulatory approvals for the sale and acquisition of 65.4% of the total outstanding shares. This transaction was outlined in the stock purchase agreement dated October 17, 2024, between buyer Joint Stock Company Kaspi.kz and the controlling shareholders of Hepsiburada. The approvals were granted by the Turkish Competition Board, the Banking Regulation and Supervision Agency, the Information Technologies and Communications Authority, and the Central Bank of the Republic of Türkiye.

news.headline: Biden rejects Japan's Nippon takeover bid for U.S. Steel, citing national security concerns over the iconic PA company.
news.summary: The president has announced plans to safeguard national security by determining the future of a well-known Pennsylvania company, which has been a heated topic in the political arena during an election year.

news.headline: Pine AI offers autonomous AI for customer service, resolving complex issues for consumers. Platform introduced on Jan. 3, 2025.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, in San Francisco, the tech company Pine AI introduced a new innovative AI assistant aimed at handling customer support interactions for consumers. This AI platform is equipped to efficiently tackle intricate tasks including bill negotiations, dispute resolutions, and managing complaints. The company released an introductory video showcasing the functionalities of the AI assistant.

news.headline: HNO International reduces outstanding shares by 82% with exchange of 360 million shares. Leading in clean energy tech.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, HNO International, Inc. (OTC Pink: HNOI), a prominent player in hydrogen-based clean energy technologies, declared a significant decrease in its outstanding Common Stock shares. This reduction came after the return exchange of 360 million shares.

news.headline: Alison Davis promoted to General Manager of WTOK-TV in Meridian, Mississippi by Gray Media; effective January 6, 2025.
news.summary: In Atlanta on January 3, 2025, Gray Media, Inc. (NYSE: GTN) revealed the appointment of Alison Davis as the new General Manager of WTOK in Meridian, Mississippi. Starting on January 6, 2025, she will take on this role at the ABC/CW/Telemundo affiliate while continuing her duties as the Director of Sales for the station.

news.headline: Posiflex to showcase innovative POS solutions at NRF 2025 in NYC. 40 years of expertise, booth #6003 at Javits Center.
news.summary: Posiflex, a leading player in point-of-sale (POS) technology for four decades, is set to unveil innovative solutions revolutionizing intelligent POS interactions. The company will showcase its latest technology at NRF 2025: Retail’s Big Show in New York City’s Javits Center at booth #6003. This event aims to enhance both consumer and operator experiences with cutting-edge POS offerings. Posiflex's commitment to driving POS advancement is evident through its impactful presence at this premier industry event.

news.headline: New listings up 8% and total homes for sale rose 10% year over year as per Redfin's report, indicating more options for buyers.
news.summary: Seattle-based real estate brokerage firm Redfin (NASDAQ: RDFN) reported a notable 8% year-over-year increase in new listings during the four weeks leading up to December 29. Additionally, the total inventory of homes for sale saw a 10% rise during the same period. Redfin has temporarily paused its analytical commentary for this week; however, detailed housing market data can be found in the tables below. The firm plans to resume full analysis next week. For comprehensive insights into the housing market from Redfin economists, stay tuned.

news.headline: Eli Lilly joins lawsuit over compounded obesity drugs, aims for swift resolution. FDA orders responses by Jan 15 and Jan 21. shortages resolved, compounders reminded of restrictions.
news.summary: Eli Lilly And Co (NYSE:LLY) has filed a motion to intervene as a defendant in a case between the Outsourcing Facilities Association and FarmaKeio Custom Compounding against the FDA. The court has instructed the Outsourcing Facilities Association to respond by January 15, with Eli Lilly’s reply due by January 21. In early October, the FDA stated that Eli Lilly’s tirzepatide injection shortage issue had been resolved. The U.S. health regulator has reminded compounders about the legal restrictions on producing copies of FDA-approved drugs. Tirzepatide injection, known as Mounjaro and Zepbound, faced a shortage starting in 2022 due to increased demand. This scarcity led compounding pharmacies and outsourcing facilities to produce the drug to meet patient needs. US Employer Health Costs are projected to increase in 2025, driven by weight loss efforts.

news.headline: Entropia Universe developed by MindArk PE AB in Sweden is a MMORPG with 2 decades of history, offering a blend of real and virtual economies for players to explore.
news.summary: In Gothenburg, Sweden on January 3, 2025, Entropia Universe, an innovative MMORPG known for its unique combination of real and virtual economies, is welcoming players to explore its dynamic virtual world. Having a rich history spanning more than 20 years, Entropia Universe offers an immersive experience for players looking to engage in a constantly evolving universe.

news.headline: Avantor to present at 43rd Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference.CEO Michael Stubblefield to participate.
news.summary: In Radnor, Pennsylvania on January 3, 2025, Avantor, Inc., a prominent company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol AVTR, specializing in essential products and services for clients in the life sciences and advanced technology sectors, disclosed that their President and CEO, Michael Stubblefield, is slated to speak at the 43rd...

news.headline: Rigel Pharmaceuticals, Inc. grants awards under Inducement Plan, approved by Board of Directors. (Includes Inducement Grants under NASDAQ Listing Rule 5635(c)(4))
news.summary: On January 3, 2025 in South San Francisco, California, Rigel Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: RIGL) revealed that it had awarded grants as part of the Rigel Pharmaceuticals, Inc. Inducement Plan. These awards were approved by the Compensation Committee of Rigel's Board of Directors.

news.headline: Kaliber Management appoints Brent Dudley as President to support growth. Operates 2,000+ units in Southeast US.
news.summary: In Baldwin County, Alabama, Kaliber Management, a prominent manufactured home community operator ranked in the top 100 in the U.S., has appointed Brent Dudley as its new President. Based in Daphne, Alabama, the company is well-known for its expertise in real estate management, with a vertically integrated business model that encompasses in-house construction, community development, and a manufactured home retail division. Kaliber currently oversees a portfolio of more than 2,000 units spread across the southeastern region of the country.

news.headline: MARA reports 15% increase in hash rate to 53.2 EH/s, holds 44,893 BTC, and 2024 BTC yield per share of 62.7%.
news.summary: The hash rate of the energy-boosted system has surged by 15% to reach a new level of 53.2 EH/s. Additionally, the Bitcoin holdings now stand at 44,893 BTC. Each share yields a significant amount of 2024 BTC, translating to a return rate of 62.7%.

news.headline: Biden blocks Nippon Steel’s proposed takeover of US Steel.
HOPE Therapeutics, Inc. will host an investor workshop for Qualified Institutional Investors at Mar-A-Lago Club on Jan 6, 2025.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, HOPE Therapeutics, Inc., a subsidiary of NRx Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: NRXP), based in Miami, announced an invitation to Qualified Institutional Investors to attend an investor workshop. The purpose of the workshop is to seek support for planned acquisitions aimed at expanding a national network of interventional psychiatry practices.该 workshop aims to raise funding to acquire more practices focused on improving mental health services.

news.headline: 2025 wave season sees surge in cruise vacations as travelers seek warm escapes. Squaremouth data reveals top trends.
news.summary: In St. Petersburg, Florida, the 2025 wave season has begun, and tourists are eagerly boarding cruise ships to avoid the winter chill. Squaremouth, the country's premier travel insurance marketplace, has released new findings highlighting the key trends for this season. With a surge in interest, the data points to increasing numbers of travelers booking cruises for their winter getaways.

news.headline: Carmell closes $1.85M PIPE Investment offering 8,065,210 shares of common stock and warrants priced at $0.23.
news.summary: Carmell Corporation, a bio-aesthetics company trading on Nasdaq under the symbol CTCX, announced the completion of a private placement deal on January 3, 2025. The agreement, initially disclosed on December 23, 2024, involved the issuance and sale of 8,065,210 shares of common stock and an equal number of five-year warrants, each priced at $0.23 per share. The private placement generated $1.85 million in total gross proceeds, excluding offering expenses and fees. This amount was slightly higher than the closing price of CTCX on December 23, 2024.

news.headline: SoFi (NASDAQ: SOFI) to hold conference call on Jan 27, 2025, at 8 am Eastern Time to discuss Q4 & full year 2024 results.
news.summary: SoFi Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: SOFI) based in San Francisco, is organizing a conference call on January 27, 2025, at 8 a.m. EST to review financial and operating outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. This one-stop financial services platform assists members in borrowing, saving, spending, investing, and safeguarding their money. In addition, SoFi intends to publish its financial results for Q4 and the fiscal year 2024 on its investor relations website.

news.headline: Evercore ISI's 11th Annual Utility CEO Conference to be held in Scottsdale, Arizona on Jan 8-10, 2025, with 33 leading companies in attendance.
news.summary: Evercore (NYSE: EVR) has announced its plans to hold the 11th annual Utility CEO Conference from January 8-10, 2025 in Scottsdale, Arizona. The event will gather 33 top companies in the power & utilities sector to discuss their roles in the advancing AI landscape. As power and infrastructure are crucial for new data center developments, this sector is becoming a major player in AI innovation. The conference aims to facilitate networking and collaboration among key industry players shaping the AI revolution.

news.headline: Swave Photonics secures $28.27M Series A funding for new 3D holographic display products.
news.summary: Swave Photonics, a company specializing in true holographic display technology, has recently finalized its Series A funding round with a total of €27 million ($28.27 million). This funding milestone was achieved by the company's operations in Leuven, Belgium, and Silicon Valley, California.

news.headline: D. E. Shaw expresses disappointment with Air Products and Chemicals board, plans to support change at 2025 annual meeting.
news.summary: D. E. Shaw group has voiced dissatisfaction over the Board's inefficiency in handling the CEO transition process. The group disclosed plans to push for reforms at the upcoming 2025 Annual Meeting. Based in New York, D. E. Shaw operates as a worldwide investment and technology development company.

news.headline: Global CX outsourcing market valued at $106.72 billion in 2023, expected to reach $171.81 billion in 2028, with top 8 players holding 30% market share.
news.summary: In Dublin, a report on the CX Outsourcing Market has recently been included on ResearchAndMarkets.com's platform. The analysis covers Deployment Types (On Premise and Cloud), Components (Services and Software), Industry Verticals (Retail, BFSI, IT & Telecom, Healthcare, Government, Energy & Utilities, Others), Region, Size, and Trends, with forecasts up to 2029. The global CX outsourcing market saw a value of US$106.72 billion in 2023, with projections indicating it will reach US$171.81 billion by 2028.
